other_observers: None; Uncertain - might have been Tony Leukering or Bill Schmoker. Was definitely seen on 9/11 or earlier.
specific_location: Southeast corner of Jumbo Reservoir. 13 T 696613 4532685 (estimate from Garmin MapSource)
description: Large size comparable to Killdeer, 'sturdy' body shape correct for knot, grayish back, streaky throat and breast, barred flanks. Leg color dull yellow. Straight black bill, dark line from bill back to behind eye. Dark eye.Behaviors: Pair of birds moved slowly along mud at edge of water. Not running like peeps or plovers, methodical in searching / feeding.Call: NonePlumage: adult non breeding
photographer: Photographer: Randy Siebert, Randy Siebert, Randy Siebert
